markets.question: Will BTC price be above $3,000 in 1 hour?
New Google Cloud Compute Engine US-East Incident Report

Will the official OpenAI API status page (https://status.openai.com) report any 'major outage' or 'degraded performance' status specifically for its 'API Services' component, categorized as 'Incident' or 'Degraded Performance' at any point between event_start 2026-03-05 13:11 UTC and the closing_date 2026-03-05 13:41 UTC? Settlement will be based on the status reported on https://status.openai.com for the 'API Services' component. A 'Yes' resolution requires a clear status update indicating 'major outage' or 'degraded performance' for 'API Services' appearing and being visible on the page at any time within the defined 30-minute window. A 'No' resolution will occur if no such status is reported within the window. No data occurring after 2026-03-05 13:41 UTC may influence settlement.

Will the last trade price of Apple Inc. (AAPL) stock on the NASDAQ exchange be greater than $175.00 at the exact timestamp of 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC? The event starts at 2026-03-05 15:11 UTC and closes at 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC. Settlement will be based on the last reported trade price for AAPL on NASDAQ at precisely 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC. If the price is greater than $175.00, the market resolves 'Yes'. Otherwise, it resolves 'No'. No data occurring after 2026-03-05 15:41 UTC may influence settlement.

Will the official NBA.com injury report (stats.nba.com/teams/injuries/) for the hypothetical Los Angeles Lakers vs. Boston Celtics NBA game scheduled for March 8, 2026, explicitly list LeBron James as 'Out' at any point between event_start 2026-03-08 13:03 UTC and the closing_date 2026-03-08 13:33 UTC? The 30-minute event window is defined. Settlement will be based on the status reported on the official NBA.com injury report page for LeBron James for the specified game. A 'Yes' resolution requires his status to be officially updated to 'Out' and visibly present on the page at any time within the defined 30-minute window. A 'No' resolution will occur if no such status is reported within the window. No data occurring after closing_date 2026-03-08 13:33 UTC may influence settlement. The event starts at 2026-03-08 13:03 UTC.

Will the last trade price of Microsoft (MSFT) stock on the NASDAQ exchange be greater than or equal to $435.00 at any point between event_start 2026-03-08 16:31 UTC and the closing_date 2026-03-08 17:01 UTC? The 30-minute event window is defined. Settlement will be based on the last recorded trade price for MSFT on NASDAQ. If the last trade price touches or exceeds $435.00 at any time within the defined 30-minute window, the market resolves 'Yes'. Otherwise, it resolves 'No'. No data occurring after closing_date 2026-03-08 17:01 UTC may influence settlement. The event starts at 2026-03-08 16:31 UTC.

Will the official Mozilla Firefox Release Notes page (https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/releases/) explicitly list "Firefox 140.0" as a released version at any point between event_start 2026-03-08 21:15 UTC and the closing_date 2026-03-08 21:45 UTC? The 30-minute event window is defined. Settlement will be based on whether "Firefox 140.0" appears on the specified official release notes page within the event window. If the version is listed, the market resolves 'Yes'. Otherwise, it resolves 'No'. No data occurring after closing_date 2026-03-08 21:45 UTC may influence settlement. The event starts at 2026-03-08 21:15 UTC.
